children.text: whose applications under have demonstrated the need in the State, on an objective and quantified basis, for supplemental financial assistance to provide such services; andsection 300ff–27 of this title

that did not, for the most recent grant year pursuant to section 300ff–28(a)(1) or 300ff–28(a)(2)(F)(i) of this title for which data is available, have more than 5 percent of grant funds under such sections canceled, offset under , or covered by any waivers under .section 300ff–31a(e) of this titlesection 300ff–31a(c) of this title
The unmet need for such services, as determined under .section 300ff–27(b) of this title
An increasing need for HIV/AIDS-related services, including relative rates of increase in the number of cases of HIV/AIDS.
The relative rates of increase in the number of cases of HIV/AIDS within new or emerging subpopulations.
The current prevalence of HIV/AIDS.
Relevant factors related to the cost and complexity of delivering health care to individuals with HIV/AIDS in the eligible area.
The impact of co-morbid factors, including co-occurring conditions, determined relevant by the Secretary.
The prevalence of homelessness.
The prevalence of individuals described under .section 300ff–12(b)(2)(M) of this title
The relevant factors that limit access to health care, including geographic variation, adequacy of health insurance coverage, and language barriers.
The impact of a decline in the amount received pursuant to on services available to all individuals with HIV/AIDS identified and eligible under this subchapter.section 300ff–28 of this title

children.heading: Priority in making grants
children.label: c Priority in making grants
children.text: The Secretary shall provide funds under this section to a State to address the decline in services related to the decline in the amounts received pursuant to consistent with the grant award to the State for fiscal year 2006, to the extent that the factor under subsection (b)(10) (relating to a decline in funding) applies to the State.section 300ff–28 of this title

children.heading: Report on the awarding of supplemental funds
children.label: d Report on the awarding of supplemental funds

children.text: the total amount of supplemental funds available under this section for the year involved;
the amount of supplemental funds used in accordance with the hold harmless provisions of ;section 300ff–28(a)(2) of this title
the amount of supplemental funds disbursed pursuant to subsection (c);
the disbursement of the remainder of the supplemental funds after taking into account the uses described in paragraphs (2) and (3); and
the rationale used for the amount of funds disbursed as described under paragraphs (2), (3), and (4).

children.heading: Core medical services
children.label: e Core medical services
children.text: The provisions of apply with respect to a grant under this section to the same extent and in the same manner as such provisions apply with respect to a grant made pursuant to .section 300ff–22(b) of this titlesection 300ff–28(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Applicability of grant authority
children.label: f Applicability of grant authority
children.text: The authority to make grants under this section applies beginning with the first fiscal year for which amounts are made available for such grants under .section 300ff–31b(b)(1) of this title
